name: Artichoke Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned artichokes and chop them.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan and sauté the onions until they are translucent.
3. Add the mushrooms, chopped artichokes, and chicken broth to the pan. Cook for about 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in the green peas.
5. In a separate bowl, blend the flour into the evaporated milk.
6. Pour the flour mixture into the saucepan and stir well.
7. Cook for an additional 5 to 7 minutes, stirring frequently, until the chowder thickens slightly.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
